rationale.R1.2: The draft's narrative is internally incoherent: the related-work paragraph is inserted between two results sections (ImageNet-1k results → related work → ImageNet-C/ablation results), breaking logical flow; improving the draft requires restoring inferential continuity across sections.

rationale.R1.6: Prose polish is the canonical scope of 'improve this draft'; sentence-level issues include passive constructions, a jarring tonal shift around 'Crucially,' uneven paragraph lengths, and missing transitions between subsections.
